clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation within the salience and limbic networks, representing the broad overarching functional domain of processing physiological arousal, emotional valence, and mood states.

Mapping tightly onto striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, this cluster reflects the latent cognitive axis of computing subjective worth to drive goal-directed behavior, motivation, and choice.

Driven by the Default Mode Network, these terms share a latent functional axis of internally-directed cognition, specifically referencing the self across time (autobiographical) or projecting that reference to understand others (social, theory of mind).
